required_preferences.fact: Strictly avoids dairy and fried foods both at home and when dining out, selecting only heart-healthy pescatarian and vegetarian meals regardless of social setting

supersedes.fact: Chooses pescatarian protein options at home but only eats vegetarian when dining out with friends

required_preferences.fact: Uses a short, guided mindfulness or breathing session at her desk to decompress after meetings — avoids walks due to mobility restrictions during recovery

supersedes.fact: Uses an afternoon walk after project meetings to decompress and reset focus before returning to analytical tasks

required_preferences.fact: Performs physician-recommended wrist and forearm physical therapy exercises daily after work, as part of her evening routine
Follows dedicated online support groups for women managing high cholesterol and shares progress weekly, seeking accountability and community advice
Prepacks healthy lunches every night to save time in the morning — never buys lunch during the workweek
Keeps Slack notifications muted except during post-lunch hours — refuses to check messages continuously

persona: A recent MBA graduate specializing in business intelligence and analytics
